name: DOMO, INC.
summary: PART I Overview At Domo, we believe people and data are an organization's most valuable assets in the cloud era. Our cloud-based platform is a modern AI and data products platform that enables processes that are critically dependent on business intelligence data which historically could take weeks, months or longer to be done on-the-fly, in as fast as minutes or seconds, at scale.
